subject: Gothita, a small black and white humanoid Pokemon with ribbon-like appendages and large eyes, standing in a bright interior setting
description: A small round-bodied figure stands upright in what appears to be a bright room or hallway with light-colored walls. The creature has a smooth black head covering with white trim and ribbon-like appendages hanging from the sides, resembling a bonnet or elaborate bow. Large round eyes are the most prominent facial feature. The body is wrapped in a black and white layered dress-like form. The background is soft and pale with indistinct geometric shapes suggesting an indoor setting. The overall image has a clean, delicate art style.
foreground: small round humanoid figure in black and white layered form with ribbon appendages and large eyes
background: pale interior with soft geometric light
emotion: wide-eyed and watchful; still and composed
